scripts.check: node --check src/core.js && node --check src/settings.js && node --check src/service-worker.js && node --check src/react-bridge.js && node --check src/content.js && node --check src/options.js
scripts.package:webstore: mkdir -p dist && zip -FS dist/kebap-$npm_package_version-webstore.zip manifest.json src/core.js src/settings.js src/options.js src/options.html src/options.css src/service-worker.js src/content.js src/react-bridge.js assets/icons/icon-16.png assets/icons/icon-32.png assets/icons/icon-48.png assets/icons/icon-128.png
